name: BLACKBAUD INC
business: We are the world's leading provider of AI-powered solutions for social impact. Serving nonprofits, educational institutions, companies committed to corporate social responsibility and individual change makers. Our AI-powered solutions are built specifically for fundraising and relationship management, marketing and engagement, financial management, grant and award management, education management, ticketing, social responsibility, payment services and analytics.
sellsTo: companies committed to corporate social responsibility

exposures.sentence: We are the world's leading provider of AI-powered solutions for social impact.

At bbcon, our annual user conference in October 2025, we launched Agents for Good, our agentic AI suite, designed to augment customer teams with virtual AI-driven assistants capable of autonomously executing complex workflows across fundraising, finance and corporate impact functions.
We are continuing to make investments in the business in areas such as innovation, AI, cybersecurity and our continued shift of cloud infrastructure to leading public cloud service providers.
Blackbaud Integrated Payments (formerly, Blackbaud Merchant Services) is a value-added service integrated with our solutions that makes credit card processing simple and secure.

catalysts.sentence: In late 2025, we released Blackbaud AI Chat, which provides contextual responses within our solutions and assists users in completing tasks more efficiently.

catalysts.event: Launch of Agents for Good at bbcon
catalysts.sentence: At bbcon, our annual user conference in October 2025, we launched Agents for Good, our agentic AI suite, designed to augment customer teams with virtual AI-driven assistants capable of autonomously executing complex workflows across fundraising, finance and corporate impact functions.
During 2026, we intend to repurchase between 5.0% and 10.0% of our outstanding common stock as of December 31, 2025 under our existing stock repurchase program.

catalysts.event: Expected pre-tax GCC workforce transition costs in 2026
catalysts.sentence: In connection with these efforts, we currently expect to incur pre-tax GCC workforce transition costs of $6 million to $8 million in 2026, consisting primarily of severance and other employee transition related expenses.
